May 29, 2024 
Measles Cases and Outbreaks 
Find the latest numbers of confirmed U.S. measles cases. CDC updates this page weekly. 
May 16, 2025 
Symptoms and Complications 
First signs of measles are fever, cough, & runny nose 7–14 days after infection. 
Plan for Travel 
Prepare for international travel with the measles, mumps, and rubella (MMR) vaccine. 
Vaccination 
Learn about measles vaccine basics, who should get it, when to get it, and why it's important. 
Measles Resources 
Download, print, and share free measles resources. 
For Professionals 
Stay Alert for Measles Cases 
Learn what to do if you suspect your patient has measles or was exposed to measles. 
Apr. 8, 2025 
Clinical Overview 
Learn about clinical diagnosing and treating measles cases. 
July 15, 2024 
For Health Departments 
Get key measles resources including case definitions and outbreak and response procedures. 
Be Ready for Measles Toolkit 
Use this toolkit to help you communicate, prepare, and respond to measles cases and outbreaks. 
Lab Testing 
Detection of measles RNA by RT-PCR can provide laboratory confirmation of infection. 
Vaccine Recommendations 
Find routine MMR information, evidence of immunity, other considerations for measles vaccine.
